items.title: SBI Q3 Results: Profit jumps 24% YoY to Rs 21,028 crore, NII rises 9%
items.description: SBI Q3 Results: India's largest public sector lender State Bank of India (SBI) on Saturday reported 24% year-on-year (YoY) growth in its standalone net profit at Rs 21,028 crore in the third quarter. Net interest income for the same period increased 9% YoY to Rs 45,190 crore.
